audit_items.proof_trace: The function contains no free()/delete/delete[] calls, making the UAF property vacuously true. All access to the 'nodes' UVector64 uses integer indices via elementAti() returning int64_t copies, never raw pointers into the vector buffer; any reallocation inside helper calls (findOrInsertNodeForRootCE, insertNodeBetween) is transparent. Raw pointers baseData and rootElements.elements reference the globally-owned root CollationTailoring singleton, which is never freed during the synchronous single-threaded build.
